title: Reflex Arc
hint: Tap the orange receptor to fire a signal
guideIdle: 1) Tap Receptor (or Stimulate) · 2) Watch the signal · 3) Toggle brain and compare speed
guideFired: Signal traveling… follow the gold pulse along the pathway
guideDoneFast: Done! Fast spinal reflex — brain was skipped. Toggle brain and try again.
guideDoneSlow: Done! Slower path — the signal visited the brain. Toggle brain off to compare.
slow: Slower — path went through the brain
learnMore: A reflex can finish in the spinal cord so you pull away before the brain “notices.”
